date.
605 V0200C2_CARE_PLN_DT V0200C2_CARE_PLN_DT V0200C2 Care Plan Completion Date CHAR 8 The data in this column contains the date that the staff completed the care planning decision.
606 X0100_TRANS_TYPE_CD X0100_TRANS_TYPE_CD X0100 Type of Record Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the type of record that is being submitted (new, modification or inactivation). 1=Add new record
2=Modify existing record
3=Inactivate existing record
607 X0150_CRCTN_PRVDR_TYPE_CD
